title: hypocalymma minus
intro: Hypocalymma minus, also known as the red eyed cassy, is a shrub native to Western Australia, characterized by its pink or red flowers and edible fruit. The medicinal properties of Hypocalymma minus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Hypocalymma minus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Hypocalymma minus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and jams, which are often used for medicinal and culinary purposes.
